headlines.title: Justice Department agrees not to pursue any tax claims against Trump as part of IRS deal
headlines.description: The addendum comes a day after the Justice Department announced that Trump and his co-plaintiffs would drop their $10 billion suit against the IRS.

headlines.title: Trump loyalty tests, major battlegrounds and more: What to watch in Tuesday’s elections
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s campaign to suppress dissent in his own party faces its most prominent test yet as he takes aim at Rep. Thomas Massie in Kentucky, while GOP candidates across the country look to leverage the president’s endorsement in key primaries.

headlines.title: NAACP calls for Black student-athletes to boycott Southern schools amid redistricting backlash
headlines.description: The NAACP is urging Black student-athletes to withhold their college commitments in states where new congressional maps could be drawn.

headlines.title: People are 'fed up', says Democrat candidate Amy McGrath on bid to flip Kentucky Senate seat
headlines.description: Former Marine fighter pilot Amy McGrath joins Meet the Press NOW on her Democratic Senate primary run and her strategy to flip Sen. Mitch McConnell’s (R-Ky.) seat.

headlines.title: Kentucky Senate seat is 'most flippable' race, says Democrat candidate Charles Booker
headlines.description: Fmr. State Rep. Charles Booker (D-Ky.) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss his bid to flip retiring Sen. Mitch McConnell’s (R-Ky.) Senate seat.

headlines.title: GOP Kentucky Senate candidate Daniel Cameron says he’d be 'a new face' in Republican Party
headlines.description: Former Kentucky Attorney General Daniel Cameron joins Meet the Press NOW to talk about his Senate bid against Trump-endorsed Rep. Andy Barr.

headlines.title: What GOP officials are hopeful — and worried — about six months from the midterms
headlines.description: President Donald Trump isn’t on the ballot this year, but with roughly six months before Election Day, he’ll still likely be the biggest factor in determining the fortunes of the Republican Party

headlines.title: Trump allies and Christian leaders kick off America’s 250th birthday with religious rally on National Mall
headlines.description: Thousands gathered on the National Mall on Sunday for a day of prayer, worship music and patriotic speeches for an event celebrating the nation’s 250th anniversary that supporters hail as a public affirmation of faith in America but critics view as an exclusionary display that blurs the line between religion and politics.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: DOJ official told GOP ally that big payouts were coming for Jan. 6 defendants
headlines.description: Months before the $1.7 billion fund was announced, Justice Department official Ed Martin said Capitol rioters would get millions, even if it took until 2028.

headlines.title: Trump endorses Ken Paxton over Sen. John Cornyn in Texas Republican Senate runoff
headlines.description: President Donald Trump endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton for the Senate, dealing a massive political blow to longtime Sen.

headlines.title: What to watch for tonight in Thomas Massie’s unique district: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: Steve Kornacki dives into the key places to watch in Rep. Thomas Massie’s district tonight as he tries to fend off a GOP primary challenger backed by President Donald Trump.
